text.content: Visit MAXAM at the XXXVI International Mining Convention 2025

rich_text.plain_text: Visit MAXAM at the XXXVI International Mining Convention 2025

text.content: November 19-22, 2025Location – Mundo Imperial Fairgrounds, Acapulco, Guerrero, Mexico

rich_text.plain_text: November 19-22, 2025Location – Mundo Imperial Fairgrounds, Acapulco, Guerrero, Mexico

text.content:
Join MAXAM at the International Mining Convention in Acapulco, MX and witness the power of innovation, performance, and determination on display. Recognized as the most significant event in Mexico’s mining industry, the International Mining Convention showcases advancements in research and technological innovation presented by national and international experts.

The event will feature more than 40 conferences and workshops, an expansive mining expo with over 320 exhibitors, and various networking activities such as technical panels, business forums and social events. Under the theme ‘Mining United for Mexico’, the convention aims to foster collaboration and innovation within the sector. Notably, the decision to host the event in Acapulco reflects the industry's solidarity with the region, supporting its recovery from recent natural disasters.

text.content: Come visit the MAXAM team at booth #468, 468A, 470, 470A, 472, 472A.
